_usage: RF02 Version Lock template for RP02 BBBP Classification Baseline (ECFP4 + LR). Run rp02_bbbp.m to generate lock_snapshot.json with actual values in result/runs/<ts>/.
_note: This file defines the lock schema. Actual values are filled in by emk.setup.lockfile(snap, filePath) after each successful run.

paper.title: MoleculeNet: A Benchmark for Molecular Machine Learning

model: Logistic Regression (L2 ridge) with Morgan ECFP4 (radius=2, nBits=2048)

split.note: Wu et al. use Bemis-Murcko scaffold split. This reproduction uses random split; see README.md Discussion for impact.

rf03_criteria._note: Only auc_cv is a pass/fail criterion. acc_cv and balacc_cv are not evaluated for RP02 (sklearn LR reports AUC-based metrics only; accuracy-based fields were removed with the M-REPRO-AUDIT A1 fitclinear-to-sklearn migration).
